description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gradle:jdk8 Docker image and sets GRADLE_OPTS to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false. Define three stages: build, test, and package. In the build stage add a build job that runs gradle compileJava and stores the directories jdip_168r1/build, tools/conversion/build, jdipFacade/build, jdip_plugins/exporter/build, jdip_plugins/inspector/build, and jdip_plugins/maptool/build as artifacts that expire in 1 day. In the test stage add a test job that first executes find . -name build -print0 | xargs -0 -I{.} find {.} -exec touch {} +, then runs gradle test, and publishes JUnit reports from jdip_168r1/build/test-results/test/TEST-*.xml as a test artifact that expires in 3 days. In the package stage add a package job that depends on the build job, runs the same touch command, then runs gradle assemble, and publishes all generated zip, tar, and jar files from the various modules as artifacts that expire in 1 week; this job only runs on the master branch or any branch matching the regex ^release.*$.
